strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
Diverse technology stack experience including Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang
concerns: Lack of direct experience in AI strategy and cloud technologies

response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development and some experience with AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct experience in AI strategy and cloud technologies.
